task_completion.description: The agent analyzed the disk image and enumerated the allocated JPEG files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing TSK commands (e.g., 'fls') executed against '/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd' or the Autopsy GUI showing the loaded image and a list of files with .jpg/.jpeg extensions.

task_completion.description: The agent identified the allocated JPEG file with the smallest logical size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing file size comparisons (e.g., using 'istat', 'ils', or sorting output) or the Autopsy GUI with files sorted by size to isolate the smallest JPEG.

task_completion.description: The agent determined the logical size and starting sector/block address of the target JPEG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'istat' output for the target file's inode displaying its size and block addresses, or the Autopsy file metadata tab showing the logical size and sector details.

task_completion.description: The agent examined the physical data block containing the end of the file (slack space).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'blkcat' or 'dd' output for the specific block at the end of the file, or a hex editor/Autopsy hex view showing the raw bytes immediately following the logical end-of-file.

task_completion.description: The agent extracted the cryptographic key starting with 'KEY-' from the slack space.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or GUI showing the extracted key string (e.g., 'KEY-...') visible within the hex dump, 'strings' output, or text view of the specific slack space block.

task_completion.description: The agent wrote the structured forensic report to the specified path with the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'cat', 'echo', or a text editor (like nano/vim) displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/slack_extraction_report.txt' containing exactly the lines for TARGET_FILE, LOGICAL_SIZE_BYTES, STARTING_SECTOR, and EXTRACTED_KEY.

integrity.description: The agent used genuine forensic tools (TSK or Autopsy) to analyze the disk image rather than fabricating the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show actual execution of TSK commands (fls, istat, blkcat) or interaction with the Autopsy GUI, not just a text editor with the final answers.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the forensic process by simply searching the entire disk image for 'KEY-' strings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of commands like 'strings jpeg_search.dd | grep KEY-' used as a shortcut to guess the key without identifying the specific slack space block first.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or generated the report file rather than copying a pre-existing solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history showing the creation, echoing, or editing of '/home/ga/Reports/slack_extraction_report.txt'.
